situation: audit-2026-07-07-047 derived fix. chrome.runtime.sendMessage for pipelineProgress uses .catch(() => {}) — silently swallows all errors including disconnected-listener bugs during development.
action: Replace silent .catch(() => {}) with .catch(err => console.warn(...)) to preserve fire-and-forget semantics while surfacing failures for debugging.
outcome_evidence: Commit b743f8f on auto/opt-background-1783213292, pushed to origin. cp-guard triggered (diverged worktree), used case-104 direct-edit channel.
next_suggestion: Next pending: SZ-SP-L-001 (deletedStack stale closure in handleRegionsChange) or SZ-SP-L-002 (handleDeleteText stale closure). Both are sidepanel route-fixes.

audit_findings.finding: pipelineProgress sendMessage .catch(() => {}) silently swallows all errors
audit_findings.remediation: Replace with .catch(err => console.warn('[background] pipelineProgress sendMessage failed:', err))
